title: File a Case
description: Begin by submitting your case through our secure online form. Provide as much detail as possible about your situation — every piece of information, no matter how small, helps us understand what you are facing and how we can help.

title: Assessment
description: Once your submission is received, our team conducts a thorough preliminary review. We evaluate the details, identify the nature of the case, and determine whether we are the right team to take it on before moving forward.

title: Consultation
description: You will be contacted to arrange a confidential one-on-one meeting with one of our lead investigators. This is where we ask the deeper questions, align on objectives, and outline the investigative approach best suited to your case.

title: Investigation
description: Our team gets to work — deploying fieldwork, digital forensics, and intelligence gathering simultaneously. Every lead is pursued, every piece of evidence is examined, and every finding is cross-referenced until the full truth emerges.

title: Report
description: We present our findings in a detailed confidential report and personally walk you through every discovery. You leave with complete clarity, documented evidence, and the answers you came to us for.
